Auto-detected anomalies vs. your trailing 8-week baseline. Updated every sync.

Labor plan vs actual · last 30 days
Scheduled hours from 7shifts compared to actuals clocked in. A diagnostic layer on top of labor cost percent — shows where staffing is running over or under plan.

Weekly ops review · diagnostic walk

Section 01 · Price spikes · last 14 days
Invoice-line price anomalies 0
Unit price ≥ 1.3× the 90-day median for that item · UOM · ranked by $ impact · catches single-line spikes buried in otherwise-normal invoices. Yellow pill = InProgress (not yet approved — still actionable)
Loading price spikes…
Section 02 · Price indexes · top items by 90-day spend
This week's avg unit price vs 4-week trailing avg
Auto-ranked by total spend · sparkline shows last 6 weeks · red tile = up ≥5% vs trailing
Loading price indexes…
Section 03 · Location price comparison
Same SKU · different locations
Most-recent unit price per location (last 21 days) for items purchased at 2+ locations · sorted by spread · ≥5% = red (negotiation ammo or data-entry check)
Loading comparison…
Section 01 · Top vendors · last 30 days
Spend ranking
Ranked by AP spend · trend is this week vs 4-week trailing average · spike = >1.5× trailing AND >$500 gap
Loading vendors…
Section 02 · Consolidation opportunities
Commodity items bought from 2+ vendors
Ranked by potential savings if consolidated to the cheapest vendor at current volumes · proprietary SKUs (your beef blend, signature buns, fries) auto-excluded when single-sourced · "pin" to protect from recommendation
Loading opportunities…
Section 03 · Unusual invoices
Invoices > 1.5× that vendor's trailing average at that location
Filters out vendors with <3 invoices to avoid false positives
Loading…
Section 01 · Period Auditor — "Find the Lie"
Four-lies forensic on every period close
Inventory smoothing · calendar mismatch · sales mix drift · theoretical-vs-actual. Surfaces lies in your reported food cost number, ranked by $ impact. Runs Mon 8am ET via cron.
Click "Run audit now" or wait for the next Monday cron. Flags land in The Loop and route to #leadership.
Section 02 · Top 20 Last-Checked
"When did you last quote this?"
Top SKUs by 90d spend, ranked by audit-need = days_since_quote × log10($) × (1 + |drift|). Surfaces the negotiation move that fits — Spec Sheet · Quarterly Review · Rebate Audit · Credible Threat. Runs Mon 7am ET via cron.
Click "Run audit now" or wait for the next Monday cron. Flags land in The Loop and route to #leadership.
Section 03 · Log a vendor quote
Seed the "last-quoted" timeline
The Top 20 agent reads `vendor_quotes`. Every row you log here pushes a SKU off the "never quoted" list and changes the recommended negotiation move accordingly.
Item
Vendor
Quote date
Unit price
Pack size

Section 01 · Predictive ordering
Reorder queue · par alerts · days of supply
Par = trailing 4-week avg weekly qty. Days-of-supply assumes last order qty at current pace. Overdue = past next-reorder date · Soon = due in ≤2 days.

🧠 HeyRai Kitchen Diagnosis
Analyzing...
Cook efficiency leaderboard
Line-cook leaderboard
Click any column to sort. The station filter applies to cooks who touched that station in the window.
How this is calculated

Attribution. Toast doesn't tag which cook plated which item, so for every food item fired we count how many line cooks were on the clock at that moment and split credit evenly. Two cooks on flattop at 7:02pm when a burger fires → each gets 0.5 credit. Total credit always sums to exactly the items produced.

Scope. Roles sautee · flattop · fry · expo · chef. Food categories: Burger, Entree, Starter, Sandwich, Side, Soup/Salad. Modifiers and drinks excluded. Voids excluded. Cooks with fewer than 8 hours in the window are hidden; rows under 20 hours show a ★ (small sample).

Avg ticket is the avg fulfillment time of all kitchen tickets fired at their location during their clocked-in window — a proxy for line speed while they were on. Expo/chef see the whole line; sauté/flattop/fry only influence a subset, so cross-station comparisons on that column are noisier.

Average ticket time over time
All dates summary
